tagline: Lawn care that makes the neighbors slow down.

hero.title: GreenStripe lawn care hero image
hero.alt: A lawn care professional trimming a crisp green front lawn.

contact.serviceArea: Northside neighborhoods, west suburbs, and the sunny lawns in between

copy.eyebrow: Local lawn care with tidy edges
copy.heroTitle: Your lawn, minus the weekend chore.
copy.heroText: GreenStripe keeps yards crisp, healthy, and party-ready with mowing, edging, seasonal cleanups, and friendly crews who actually close the gate.
copy.introTitle: The grass-is-greener treatment, without the drama.
copy.introText: We show up when we say we will, make clean work of the messy bits, and leave your yard looking like it has its life together.
copy.quoteText: Send a note with your address, yard size, and what is bugging you. We will reply with a straightforward next step.

services.title: Weekly mowing
services.text: Clean cuts, fresh stripes, and reliable scheduling during peak growing season.

services.title: Edges and walkways
services.text: Crisp borders along drives, sidewalks, beds, and patios so everything feels finished.

services.title: Seasonal cleanups
services.text: Leaves, sticks, storm debris, and the mysterious corner pile finally meet their match.

process.title: Snap a few photos
process.text: Send the lawn, trouble spots, and the best way to access the yard.

process.title: Get a clear plan
process.text: We recommend a cadence, scope, and price without making it weird.

process.title: Enjoy the view
process.text: We keep the schedule moving and the curb appeal doing its little victory lap.
